response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY, RINSE THOROUGHLY, AVOID FOOD. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* BOX OF TOOTHBRUSH, CAR OF CLEANING, TRADITION OF HYGIENE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TWO TIMES A DAY, TWO MINUTES EACH, TWO STEPS CLEAN.

* * *

FLOSS CAREFULLY, AVOID HARM, MONITOR CHANGES. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TWO TOOTHBRUSH, TWO TOOTHFLOSS, TWO RINSING. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TRADITION OF CARE, TRADITION OF PRECAUTION, TRADITION OF PATIENCE. 

* * *

PAIN MANAGEMENT, SALTWATER RINSING, DENTAL EMERGENCIES. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TWO MEDICINES, TWO RINSING, TWO EMERGENCIES. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* CAR OF TREATMENT, CAR OF CARE, CAR OF CURE.
